_comment: SaaS demo commercial — 45-60s. Hook → Problem → Solution walkthrough → Proof → CTA. Best when client has app screenshots. Replace ALLCAPS placeholders with project-specific values.

scenes.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a developer's hands typing on a sleek mechanical keyboard, soft blue and purple LED light from a monitor screen, shallow depth of field, slow camera push-in, dramatic backlighting. No text or logos.

scenes.vo: Still managing this in a spreadsheet?
scenes._note: Show the messy 'before' state. Spreadsheet, old tool, manual process.

scenes.prompt: Abstract motion graphics in PRIMARY_COLOR and ACCENT_COLOR — clean geometric shapes morphing and assembling, suggesting transformation from chaos to order. Modern tech aesthetic, no text or logos.
